subject: I was charged twice this month
body: Hi, I noticed two charges on my credit card for $29 this month. I'm on the Pro plan. Can you help me understand why I was billed twice and get a refund for the duplicate charge?

subject: API returning 401 Unauthorized
body: I'm trying to use your REST API but every request returns 401 Unauthorized. I've double-checked my API key and it looks correct. What could be causing this?

subject: How do I add a team member?
body: I need to add a colleague to my account so they can respond to tickets. How do I invite them and what permissions will they have?

subject: Webhook not receiving events
body: I set up a webhook endpoint but I'm not receiving any events. I've checked that my endpoint is responding with 200 OK. What should I look at?

subject: Can I get a refund?
body: I just signed up yesterday and decided the product isn't right for us. I'd like a full refund please.

subject: What happens to my data if I cancel?
body: If I cancel my subscription, will my data be deleted immediately? How long do I have to export everything?

subject: SSO not working with Okta
body: We're trying to configure SSO with Okta but users can't log in after setup. We get a SAML assertion error. What should we check?

subject: Downgrade from Pro to Basic
body: I want to downgrade my plan from Pro to Basic to save costs. When will the change take effect and will I lose any features immediately?

subject: Password reset email not arriving
body: I requested a password reset email 20 minutes ago but haven't received anything. I've checked my spam folder.

subject: App keeps crashing on iOS
body: Your mobile app crashes every time I try to open it on my iPhone. I've already tried restarting my phone. iOS 16.

subject: How do I export my data?
body: I need a full export of all our tickets and customer messages for compliance purposes. How do I do this?

subject: Charge after cancellation
body: I cancelled my subscription last month but was still charged this month. This is unacceptable. I want an immediate refund.

subject: 2FA locked out of account
body: I lost my phone and now can't log in because 2FA is required. I don't have my backup codes. How do I regain access?

subject: What is your uptime SLA?
body: We're evaluating your Enterprise plan for a critical production system. What uptime guarantees do you offer and what happens if you breach the SLA?

subject: Zapier integration not triggering
body: I set up a Zap that should trigger when a new ticket is created, but it never fires even though tickets are being created in your system.

subject: How does annual billing work?
body: I'm thinking of switching to annual billing. How much do I save and when will I be charged?

subject: GDPR data deletion request
body: Under GDPR I am requesting deletion of all my personal data from your systems. What is your process and timeline?

subject: Rate limit errors in production
body: Our production integration is hitting rate limit errors (429) during peak hours. We're on the Pro plan. How can we handle this?

subject: Invoice missing VAT
body: Our company is VAT-registered in Germany and our invoice doesn't show VAT. We need proper VAT invoices for our accounting.

subject: How to set up notifications for my team?
body: Our team lead wants to receive email alerts for every escalated ticket. How do we configure this?

subject: asdfjkl qwerty random text
body: asdf asdf asdf test 12345 lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur

subject: Payment declined but account still suspended
body: I've updated my payment method but my account is still showing as suspended. How do I reactivate?

subject: API documentation question
body: Does your API support pagination for the GET /tickets endpoint? What are the pagination parameters?

subject: Can I change my account email?
body: I need to change the email address associated with my account. How do I do this?

subject: Feature request: bulk ticket assignment
body: Could you add the ability to bulk assign multiple tickets to an agent at once? This would save a lot of time for our team.

subject: Tax exempt status
body: Our nonprofit organisation is tax exempt. How do I remove the tax charge from my invoices?

subject: Data stored outside EU?
body: We're a European company with strict data residency requirements. Where is our data stored?

subject: Webhook signature verification
body: How do I verify that webhook payloads are genuinely coming from your service and not spoofed?

subject: I want to delete my account
body: I've decided to stop using your service and want to permanently delete my account and all associated data.

subject: Wrong plan after upgrade
body: I upgraded to the Enterprise plan yesterday but my account still shows Pro features. The extra seats aren't showing up.
